message:
fix: CLI list_sessions / related-sessions / timeline drop NULL-agent rows

Four production CLI query sites in src/lib.rs still inner-joined agents:

- list_sessions: 5-table aggregation query for the main listing command.
  Switched to LEFT JOIN + COALESCE(a.slug, 'unknown') and updated the
  GROUP BY to use the same COALESCE expression so NULL-agent rows
  collapse into a single 'unknown' bucket rather than being silently
  excluded.

- find_context_source_conversation (both the "with explicit source_id"
  and "canonicalized source_id" branches): same LEFT JOIN + COALESCE
  rewrite.

- related sessions (same_workspace and same_day queries): same fix,
  plus removes the multi-table JOIN with LIMIT that was also triggering
  frankensqlite's materialization fallback on paged related-session
  lookups.

- Timeline report query: LEFT JOIN + COALESCE on agents, and the
  `AND a.slug IN (...)` filter becomes an EXISTS subquery against the
  agents table so the filter still works correctly against the
  correlated lookup instead of the now-removed joined column.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
